title: pinus cephalonica var. reginae-amaliae
intro: Pinus cephalonica var. reginae-amaliae, also known as the Queen Amalia Greek pine, is a variety of the Cephalonian black pine, a coniferous tree native to Greece. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pinus cephalonica var. reginae-amaliae include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the resin of this plant is often used to make pine oil, which can be used in aromatherapy, skin care, and as a natural remedy for various health issues.
